scripts.test: node ./bin/agb.js check ./langgraph && node ./bin/agb.js check ./langgraph --code ./langgraph/examples && rm -rf /tmp/agb-map-smoke && node ./bin/agb.js map . --out /tmp/agb-map-smoke && test -f /tmp/agb-map-smoke/BUILDPRINT.md && test -f /tmp/agb-map-smoke/SPEC.md && test -f /tmp/agb-map-smoke/PLAN.md && test -f /tmp/agb-map-smoke/CONTRACTS.md && test -f /tmp/agb-map-smoke/TEST_MATRIX.md && test -f /tmp/agb-map-smoke/VALIDATION_TEMPLATE.md && test -f /tmp/agb-map-smoke/plans/00-review-facts.md && rm -rf /tmp/agb-start-smoke && mkdir /tmp/agb-start-smoke && (cd /tmp/agb-start-smoke && node /root/blueprint/bin/agb.js start http://152.53.118.78:43117/buildprints/ai-influencer-os/package.json && test -s .buildprint/snapshots/BUILDPRINT.md && test -s .buildprint/snapshots/plans/04-wavespeed-image.md) && npm run test:harness
scripts.test:harness:
rm -rf /tmp/agb-harness-smoke && node ./bin/agb.js index ./evals/golden-projects/route-patterns --out /tmp/agb-harness-smoke/index && node ./bin/agb.js map begin ./evals/golden-projects/route-patterns --out /tmp/agb-harness-smoke/map && printf "# SYSTEM_MAP
" > /tmp/agb-harness-smoke/map/01-system-map/SYSTEM_MAP.md && node ./bin/agb.js map checkpoint --workspace /tmp/agb-harness-smoke/map --phase system-map && printf "# BUILDPRINT_CANDIDATES

## 1. AI Workflow Buildprint
" > /tmp/agb-harness-smoke/map/02-candidates/BUILDPRINT_CANDIDATES.md && node ./bin/agb.js map checkpoint --workspace /tmp/agb-harness-smoke/map --phase candidates && node ./bin/agb.js map select --workspace /tmp/agb-harness-smoke/map --candidate 1 && node ./bin/agb.js map checkpoint --workspace /tmp/agb-harness-smoke/map --phase decision-gate && for f in SELECTED_CANDIDATE.md BUILDPRINT.md SPEC.md CONTRACTS.md TEST_MATRIX.md; do printf "# %s
" "$f" > /tmp/agb-harness-smoke/map/04-selected-extraction/$f; done && node ./bin/agb.js map checkpoint --workspace /tmp/agb-harness-smoke/map --phase selected-extraction && printf "# REVERSAL_REPORT
" > /tmp/agb-harness-smoke/map/05-reversal/REVERSAL_REPORT.md && node ./bin/agb.js map checkpoint --workspace /tmp/agb-harness-smoke/map --phase reversal && node ./bin/agb.js map finalize --workspace /tmp/agb-harness-smoke/map && test -f /tmp/agb-harness-smoke/map/final/BUILDPRINT.md && node ./bin/agb.js reverse /tmp/agb-harness-smoke/map/final --out /tmp/agb-harness-smoke/reversal && test -f /tmp/agb-harness-smoke/reversal/REVERSAL_PROMPT.md
